refund_policy.policy_text: 7-day no questions asked refund policy for self-service plans. Applies to self-service plans (excluding Pay As You Go) with less than 20% traffic used.
conditions: Pay As You Go plans non-refundable
refund_policy.residential_refund: API-only service - not a proxy provider
refund_policy.isp_refund: API-only service - not a proxy provider

notes: API-only scraping tool, NOT a proxy provider per se. Different category from residential proxy services.
